name: wishcode
description: Wish Code — desktop AI coding agent. In-process tool use, multi-LLM (Claude OAuth / OpenAI / xAI / Gemini / Ollama / Hermon), MCP, skills, and long-running tasks for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

scripts.build:electron: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && cp electron/dist-package.json dist-electron/package.json && mkdir -p dist-electron/native/skills/builtin && cp -R electron/native/skills/builtin/. dist-electron/native/skills/builtin/
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run build:electron && node scripts/patch-dev-name.js && electron .
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:electron && node scripts/patch-dev-name.js && NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run build:electron && npm run build:icon && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run build:electron && npm run build:icon && electron-builder --win
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && npm run build:electron && npm run build:icon && electron-builder --linux
scripts.postinstall: electron-builder install-app-deps && npm run build:icon && node scripts/patch-dev-name.js
